title: Build a Hermes Knowledge Base That Self-Improves
summary: A workflow for building a self-improving knowledge base for the Hermes AI agent by connecting an Obsidian wiki to Claude and NotebookLM, then automating ingestion of emails, meeting notes, and research via cron jobs. The approach applies Andrej Karpathy's LLM wiki principles to overcome Hermes' memory limitations.
writeup: This video walks through building a self-improving knowledge base for the Hermes AI agent by connecting an Obsidian wiki to Claude and NotebookLM. It addresses Hermes' memory limitations by automating ingestion of emails, meeting notes, and research through cron jobs. The workflow applies Andrej Karpathy's LLM wiki principles, treating the knowledge graph as persistent context the agent can draw on rather than relying on the model's own memory.
